commands.description: Full trade evaluation (ticker, seasonality, analysts, news/catalysts, dark pool, options, OI) — fetches all data in parallel, stops at first failing gate
Scan watchlist for dark pool flow signals + CRI regime overlay (COR1M, crash risk, CTA exposure) — generates HTML report
Find new candidates — market-wide (default), targeted tickers, or presets (e.g. discover ndx100)
Generate HTML portfolio report with live IB data, dark pool flow, thesis checks — opens in browser
Analyze multi-leg positions for free trade opportunities (close hedge leg to make core leg free)
View recent trade log entries
Pull live portfolio from Interactive Brokers and update portfolio.json
Trade blotter — today's fills, P&L, spread grouping, commission totals
Historical trades via IB Flex Query (up to 365 days)
Interactive scenario stress test — asks for market scenario, models bear/base/bull P&L per position, generates HTML report with expandable detail rows
IV skew risk reversal analysis — finds costless/credit directional structures, generates HTML report
Volatility-Credit Gap v2 (VCG-R) scan — VIX/VVIX/HYG regression, risk-off (VIX>28+VCG>2.5), EDR watch (VIX>25+VCG>2.0), BOUNCE counter-signal (VCG<-3.5), severity tiers 1–3
Crash Risk Index — COR1M implied correlation, CTA exposure model, crash trigger conditions
GARCH vol divergence scan — finds pairs where implied vol diverges from realized vol (supports presets)
LEAP IV mispricing scanner — finds long-dated options where IV is cheap vs realized vol
Seasonality assessment — monthly win rates and average returns from EquityClock
Fetch analyst ratings, price targets, recent upgrades/downgrades
List all available trading strategies with status, edge, instruments, and commands
Fetch MenthorQ institutional CTA positioning data
Fetch MenthorQ dashboard chart (vol, forex, eod, intraday, futures, cryptos_technical, cryptos_options). Supports --ticker for eod/intraday/futures/crypto dashboards
Fetch MenthorQ screener data (6 categories, 45 sub-screeners: gamma, gamma_levels, open_interest, volatility, volume, qscore)
Fetch MenthorQ forex gamma levels + blindspot data (14 pairs, 20+ fields per pair)
Fetch MenthorQ summary tables (futures: 93 rows, cryptos: 16 rows)
Execute a QUIN AI screener query — natural-language search across 97+ metrics per ticker. See docs/menthorq-prompts.md for preset prompts
Fetch tweets via xAI API and extract ticker sentiment (recommended, slower)
Fetch tweets via browser scraping and extract ticker sentiment (faster, lower quality)
Generate tweet copy + infographic card for sharing a trade on X — produces preview page with copy button and screenshot-ready card
Show this list of all available commands
